claim_boundary: Claim level is deliberately conservative. This artifact does not claim achieved AGI, ASI, empirical SOTA, safe autonomy, standard-setting control, guaranteed economic return, or civilization-scale capability. It records a bounded Evidence Docket. Stronger claims require independent replay, full baselines, cost/safety ledger review, delayed outcomes, and independent audit.

levels.description: Code exists and can be inspected or run locally.
levels.name: Implementation scaffold

levels.description: GitHub Actions runs a deterministic loop and uploads an artifact.
levels.name: CI replay scaffold

levels.description: Run produces manifest, job outputs, review card, compiler, comparison, decision memo, and replay instructions.
levels.name: Evidence Docket scaffold

levels.description: A clean CI job replays the docket, but no independent reviewer has signed off yet.
levels.name: Internal clean-CI replay

levels.description: An independent reviewer or clean external fork reproduces the docket.
levels.name: Independently replayed Evidence Docket

levels.description: Full baseline suite B0-B4 is run under equal constraints and the AGI ALPHA loop wins without worse safety.
levels.name: Baseline-comparative evidence

levels.description: More agents/nodes improve verified work per cost or task coverage without unacceptable overhead.
levels.name: Scaling evidence

levels.description: Runs across software, web/API, data/science, and protocol-native tasks.
levels.name: Real-task portfolio evidence

levels.description: External benchmark, delayed outcome, or independent validator confirms the result.
levels.name: External validation
